# Chapter number one

See @knuth84 for additional discussion of literate programming.

## Tables

This is a very nice table with useful data:

| Data name    | Value |
|:-------------|:-----:|
| Current year |  2026 |

: My table caption {#tbl-id-of-table}

## Images

And this is a very, very nice image:

![A cute dog and a cute cat, @catanddog](https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2018/04/Roger-H-Goun.jpg){#fig-animals width=300}
